title: ConvertKit vs Beehiiv (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ConvertKit and Beehiiv email marketing platforms. See pricing, features, and which is best for your needs.
h1: ConvertKit vs Beehiiv: Detailed Comparison for Creators and Publishers
intro: ConvertKit and Beehiiv are both freemium email marketing platforms designed for content creators, but they serve different audiences and use cases. ConvertKit focuses on creators selling courses and digital products, while Beehiiv is built specifically for newsletter publishers seeking monetization opportunities. Understanding their differences will help you choose the right platform for your business model.
choose_a_if: You're selling digital courses, products, or services and need built-in commerce features
You want the lowest entry price at $29/month for paid plans
You need visual automation workflows and landing page builders to support your sales funnel
choose_b_if: You're focused on growing and monetizing a newsletter through ads and sponsorships
You want a larger free tier with 2,500 subscribers before upgrading
You need advanced analytics, segmentation, and a web reader experience for subscribers

faq.a: Neither is universally better—it depends on your goals. Beehiiv has higher customer satisfaction ratings and is optimized for newsletter monetization, while ConvertKit excels for creators selling digital products or courses. Choose based on whether you prioritize e-commerce capabilities or newsletter growth and revenue.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ConvertKit or Beehiiv?
faq.a: ConvertKit's paid plans start at $29/month compared to Beehiiv's $39/month, making ConvertKit slightly cheaper. However, Beehiiv offers a more generous free tier with 2,500 subscribers versus ConvertKit's 1,000, which may delay costs for growing creators.

faq.q: Can I switch from Beehiiv to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support exporting subscriber lists in standard formats. You can migrate your email list between them, though you'll need to manually recreate automations, templates, and custom segments in the new platform.
